S.FORM: Devin Booker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1996, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 10, Devin Booker, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *e*in ő≤ooker ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, *e*in ő≤ooker, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
